title: Elevate UI Readability: Master CSS 'hyphens' for Seamless Text Flow
tweet: Improve text flow & readability in your UI with CSS 'hyphens'. No more awkward gaps! Learn how to create beautifully justified text. #CSSTypography #UIDesign #WebFonts #UserExperience
tip: Achieve superior text justification and prevent unsightly gaps in your paragraphs by intelligently enabling CSS 'hyphens'. This property allows browsers to automatically hyphenate words at line breaks, leading to a more consistent line length, improved aesthetics, and a smoother reading experience, especially with justified text or narrow columns. Combine it with 'text-align: justify' for the best results, ensuring a balanced and professional look across all screen sizes.
